summary: Khudrang Kalakaar — an art portfolio/gallery website for Mudit Sharma with Instagram/WhatsApp social links, a QR code for Instagram, a hidden admin panel (double-click logo) for image uploads, and a dark-themed gallery.
architectural_notes: Admin panel triggered by double-clicking the logo; credentials: username='Deepak Kumawat', password='Kinnu*0613'
Gallery images are loaded client-side via FileReader (base64) — no backend storage
QR code generated via api.qrserver.com pointing to the Instagram profile
Dark theme: background #111, panel background #222, white text

existing_features.title: The Instagram social icon link must open https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar in a new tab using rel='noopener noreferrer'. Ensure it works both from the social icons section and any other Instagram button/link in the app.
The WhatsApp social icon link must open https://wa.me/917665854193?text=Hello%20Mudit%20Sharma in a new tab.
The hidden admin panel must be triggered by a double-click (two rapid taps within 500ms) on the logo. The double-click detection must reset the tap count after 500ms to prevent accidental triggers.
Admin login must validate against username 'Deepak Kumawat' and password 'Kinnu*0613'. On success, show an upload section. On failure, display an 'Invalid Credentials' error message.

Display a QR code section on the main page with label 'Scan QR to Visit Instagram' linking to https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar using the QR image URL: https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=200x200&data=https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar

new_feature_requests.summary: The admin image upload feature must allow selecting a local image file and display it in the gallery immediately after upload, without requiring a page reload. The upload reads the file as a data URL and appends it to the gallery.
